data.title: Solana ETFs Log First Outflow After 21 Straight Days as Price Holds Above $135
data.description:
Solana ETFs in the United States experienced their first daily net outflow on November 26, 2025, ending a powerful 21-day streak of continuous institutional demand. The shift came after several weeks of steady inflows that helped drive Solana’s market recovery, even through broader weakness across the crypto sector.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/solana-etfs-log-first-outflow-after-21-straight-days-as-price-holds-above-135/

data.title: Monochrome Bitcoin ETF Holdings Reach Significant Milestone
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the Australian Monochrome Spot Bitcoin ETF (IBTC) has disclosed that its holdings have reached 1,158 bitcoins. The market value of these holdings has surpassed 161 million Australian dollars.

data.title: China Reaffirms Nationwide Crypto Ban as Regulators Target Stablecoin Risks
data.description:
China’s central bank has once again reinforced its uncompromising stance on digital assets. During a meeting on November 28, 2025, the People’s Bank of China (PBOC) reiterated that virtual assets, including cryptocurrencies and stablecoins, remain fully prohibited across the mainland.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/china-reaffirms-nationwide-crypto-ban-as-regulators-target-stablecoin-risks/

According to the report, more than 60 people have spoken out after a report […]

data.title: US and EU Traders Push Bitcoin Higher as Selling Pressure Finally Cools
data.description:
Bitcoin is posting a steady recovery this week, with US and European trading hours taking clear leadership in driving returns. This shift marks a notable turnaround from recent weeks, when the same regions were responsible for sharp sell-offs and persistent downward price pressure.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/us-and-eu-traders-push-bitcoin-higher-as-selling-pressure-finally-cools/

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. The Hyperliquid team unstaking 2.6 million HYPE tokens in their wallet and conducted small-scale sell-offs and transfer tests; 2. The People's Bank of China held a meeting to combat cryptocurrency speculation and emphasized the risks of stablecoins; 3. BSC Meme's "Vulgar Penguin" token surpassed $10 million in market capitalization, rising over 180% in a single day; 4. KlarnaUSD, the first stablecoin under Swedish payment giant Klarna, was launched ahead of schedule; 5. The co-founder of Alliance DAO stated that L1 tokens lack a moat, and while they wouldn't short them, they weren't considered high-quality investments; 6. Stablecoin protocol STBL announced the launch of its rewards claiming feature; 7. CZ stated that it's better to sell when extremely greedy and buy when extremely fearful; 8. Binance Alpha: Users with at least 256 points can claim a 400 GAIX airdrop; 9. The Hyperliquid team address began intensively transferring tokens in batches, with the largest single transaction involving approximately 75,000 HYPE tokens.

data.title: Ukraine's Security Council Secretary Heads to U.S. for Peace Talks
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky announced on social media that Rustem Umerov, Secretary of Ukraine's National Security and Defense Council and head of the Ukrainian delegation, has departed for the United States. Zelensky stated that Umerov submitted a report outlining clear objectives to swiftly and substantively develop steps needed to end the ongoing conflict. Ukraine aims to continue its constructive collaboration with the United States and anticipates that the outcomes of the Geneva conference will be implemented in the U.S.
